THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AARON ADKINS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN DATU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AARON ADKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN DATU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF PAID THE DEFENDANT IN COURT AND DOES NOT DENY LIABILITY. CASE IS SET TO MARCH 3, 2025 @ 1:30 PM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO CALL THE COURT PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE OR TWO WEEKS AFTER THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT IS COMPLIED WITH. IF THE CHECK CLEARED CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOR REPORTED (D506)
